description.p: A new professional securities trading desktop application, delivering an ultra-smooth investment experience for more efficient and convenient trading.

ul.li: Fixed an issue where modifying a sell order incorrectly triggered a short-sell risk warning.
Chart: Added K-line "Interval Statistics", making it easier to monitor and review price action.
Chart: Added a right-click context menu to switch K-line type, adjust type, or open the trade window without going to Global Settings.
Chart: Added Y-axis zoom for adjusting the price axis independently.
Trade: Options trading now supports attached orders (stop-loss / take-profit).
Stock Reminder: Added push notification support, so alerts arrive in real time.
Quotes: Added activity tags (earnings, dividends, IPOs, important advisories, etc.).
Option Chain: Added financial report data, and bid/ask prices can be sent directly into the trade form.
Portfolio: Brand-new "Financing Status" page with more financing details and credit-limit adjustment.
Login: Added a password reset flow for "Forgot password", completed entirely inside the client.
Order push notifications now show the account name, and the success sound is muted for demo accounts.
Fixed state interference when quick-editing several orders in rapid succession.
Improved the trade password flow so actions like withdraw continue automatically after verification.
Fixed incorrect holding cost displayed after estimated fill on position close.
Login: Streamlined the login flow, improved the captcha network-error prompt, and added a retry mechanism.
Watchlist now supports switching the position of stock name and code.
Fixed an issue where the order session for option stop-profit/stop-loss orders was incorrect.
Fixed an issue where the estimated quantity on the order screen was displayed inaccurately.
